utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey . When you guys were kids and you played Happy Days , who were you ? I was always Richie .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I was always Joanne .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Question . Was ah , Egg the Gellers ! the war cry of your neighbourhood ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ewww ! Oh ! It is the Mattress King !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Do not look honey . Change the channel ! Change the channel !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Wait ! Wait ! I wanna see this . After I divorce him , half of that kingdom is gonna be mine .

emotion_cause.span: 6_After I divorce him , half of that kingdom is gonna be mine .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What a wank !

emotion_cause.span: 8_he is using our divorce to sell mattresses .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , I cannot believe he is using our divorce to sell mattresses .

emotion_cause.span: 8_he is using our divorce to sell mattresses .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know !

emotion_cause.span: 8_he is using our divorce to sell mattresses .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And four ninety ... nine for a pillow top queen set , who cares about the divorce , those babies will sell themselves .

emotion_cause.span: 10_four ninety ... nine for a pillow top queen set , who cares about the divorce , those babies will sell themselves .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And I am appalled for you by the way .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You had to do it , did not you ? You could not just leave it alone .

emotion_cause.span: 12_You had to do it , did not you ? You could not just leave it alone .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Four percent . Okay . I tip more than that when there is a bug in my food .

emotion_cause.span: 13_Four percent . Okay . I tip more than that when there is a bug in my food .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross , tonight was about the two of you getting along . Oh , would you just see my chiropractor , already .

emotion_cause.span: 12_You had to do it , did not you ? You could not just leave it alone .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , I am gonna go to a doctor who went to school in a mini ... mall .

emotion_cause.span: 15_I am gonna go to a doctor who went to school in a mini ... mall .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey Pheebs , what are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am , I am freaking out !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Monica kinda trusted me with something and she should not have !

emotion_cause.span: 18_Monica kinda trusted me with something and she should not have !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right , I have not lived here in a while , so I have to ask you something .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Does Monica still turn on the lights in her bedroom ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Um . yeah .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am so dead .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right , look , here is the bottom line Ross , this is fixable , if we act fast , okay .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So , I will invite him to brunch tomorrow and you can make nice .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , honey , I have tried to make nice , it does not work .

emotion_cause.span: 25_I have tried to make nice , it does not work .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , look , Ross , I realise that my Father is difficult , but that is why you have got to be the bigger man here .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look sweetie , I could be the bigger man , I could be the biggest man , I could be a big , huge , giant man , and it still would not make any difference , except that I could pick your Father up and say Like me !

emotion_cause.span: 27_I could be the bigger man , I could be the biggest man , I could be a big , huge , giant man , and it still would not make any difference

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Like me tiny doctor !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , well can not you just try it one more time Ross ? For me ? For me ?

emotion_cause.span: 29_can not you just try it one more time Ross ? For me ? For me ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Rachel , one brunch is not gonna solve anything . You gotta face it , okay we are never gonna get along .

emotion_cause.span: 30_one brunch is not gonna solve anything . You gotta face it , okay we are never gonna get along .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , well you are just gonna have to , okay .

emotion_cause.span: 30_one brunch is not gonna solve anything . You gotta face it , okay we are never gonna get along .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Because I already got a Mother and a Father who cannot stay in the same room together , okay , I do not wanna have to have a separate room for you too !

emotion_cause.span: 32_I already got a Mother and a Father who cannot stay in the same room together , okay , I do not wanna have to have a separate room for you too !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , okay , okay . I will get the bagels .
